caption: Job Trigger
description: The condition or event that initiates a job to perform an action.
name: job_trigger

event_codes.description: Event identifiers that pertain to the job trigger.

type_id.description: The normalized identifier of the job trigger.

1.caption: Boot
1.description: The job is triggered on a system boot.

2.caption: Schedule
2.description: The job is triggered on a specific schedule. Properties should be populated with respective time bounds.

3.caption: Event
3.description: The job is triggered when the specific event occurs. Properties should be populated with respective event identifiers.

99.caption: Other
99.description: The job trigger is unmapped. See the type attribute, which contains a data source specific value.

properties.description:
The list of properties associated with the trigger.
Can be used to describe time boundaries of the job, amount of repetitions or when the job should be activated or expired.

log_sources.description: A collection of log systems or components that pertain to the job trigger.

type.description: The type of trigger that must be fired for a job to be triggered.

user.description: The user that pertains to the job trigger.
